Interface IPathTraceConfiguration

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of a path trace configuration.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("AB0226A7-85C5-47AD-B72C-C6880771F864")]
public interface IPathTraceConfiguration

Properties

InferConnectivity

Returns whether connectivity should be inferred.

bool InferConnectivity { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaxHops

Returns the maximum number of hops.

int MaxHops { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

NumPaths

Returns the number of paths.

int NumPaths { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReuseCircuitLocations

Returns whether circuit locations can be reused.

bool ReuseCircuitLocations { get; set; }

Property Value

bool
